data.title: Sound Meditation

commerce.title: BODi Membership Required
commerce.subtitle: Workouts that meet you where you are, keep you coming back, and empower you to reach your goals. Get BODi now to start your first block.

seo.title: Sound Meditation
seo.description: Relieve stress, improve sleep and achieve a serene balanced headspace.

trainers.bioBodi: Scarlett de la Torre is an international sound meditation facilitator, musician, activist, and humanitarian. She discovered her passion for sound therapy when she began teaching music to survivors of trafficking. Seeing the positive impact on these survivors, she has devoted her life to sharing sound meditation.

data.descriptionShort: Relieve stress, improve sleep and achieve a serene balanced headspace.
data.descriptionLong: A collection of relaxing and rejuvenating sound meditations to help you sleep better, stress less, and achieve a more positive and productive mood. No meditation experience required.

modules.title: Is Sound Meditation Right For Me?
modules.content: Sound meditation is a centuries old healing tradition that uses sound to help calm your body and mind and promote an overall sense of well-being. Created and led by international sound meditation facilitator and musician, Scarlett de la Torre will help you feel more relaxed and peaceful — no matter what’s going on in your life. Perfect for meditation newbies.

modules.title: What Are The Classes Like?
modules.content: During each sound meditation, you’ll simply sit or lie down and focus on the sounds of the instruments, like singing bowls, harps, chimes, the didgeridoo, and more. Their soothing tones create a “sound bath,” where vibrations and frequencies help you feel at ease, rejuvenated, and content.

modules.title: Tools + Equipment
modules.content: Nothing needed, earbuds or headphones are recommended for optimal experience.

modules.title: Nutrition for a Healthier Body and Mind
modules.content: Beachbody’s nutrition programs have made it easier for millions of people to eat healthier and make simple lifestyle changes that are easy to stick with. Created by Autumn Calabrese, Portion Fix shows you how eating the right portions helps you reach your goals—no counting calories or eliminating your favorite foods required. With 2B Mindset, creator Ilana Muhlstein, MS, RDN, helps you lose weight happily by focusing on what you can eat, instead of what you can’t. You’ll never feel hungry or deprived. Need help choosing the right nutrition program for you? To find the right program for your lifestyle, visit FindMyProgramTool.com.

Seeing the positive impact on these survivors, she has devoted her life to sharing sound meditation.
